executive_summary: Adds a PocketBase handler that authenticates via the PocketBase REST API, auto-registers collections as tables, and translates MindsDB SQL queries into PocketBase calls.
Enables PocketBase users to query their collections through MindsDB for analytics/predictions.
Introduces a new feature with bug fixes and new functionality.
Fixes #11797 and #11873, adds documentation updates, and references file paths.
Includes changes to environment variables, storage directories, and SQL query handling.

change_units.description: Adds a PocketBase handler that authenticates via the PocketBase REST API.
change_units.inferred_intent: New feature to connect MindsDB to PocketBase for analytics.

change_units.description: Fixes #11797 by adding proper authentication and connection handling.
change_units.inferred_intent: Resolves authentication issues when connecting to PocketBase.

change_units.description: Fixes #11873 by adding environment variable support.
change_units.inferred_intent: Allows configuration of PocketBase credentials via environment variables.

change_units.description: Refactors code to use Pydantic for type validation and improved readability.
Updates docs to reflect new functionality and changes.
change_units.inferred_intent: Documentation should accurately describe the new PocketBase integration.

risks_and_concerns: Potential for authentication errors if credentials are incorrect or missing.
Risk of SQL injection if not properly sanitized in query construction.
Dependency on external services (PocketBase) which may be down or misconfigured.
